song.title: God Rest Ye Merry, Gentlemen
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5
song.lyrics:
[V1] . Em God rest ye merry, gentlemen . C B Let nothing you dismay . Em Remember Christ our Savior . C B Was born on Christmas Day . Am G To save us all from Satan's pow'r . Em D When we were gone astray
[C] .G B Em Tidings of comfort and joy, . D Comfort and joy! . G B Em O tidings of comfort and joy
[V2] In Bethlehem, in Judea, |This blessed babe was born And laid within a manger |'Pon this blessed morn That which His mother Mary did |Nothing take in scorn.
[V3] From God our heav'nly Father |A blessed angel came And unto certain shepherds |Brought tidings of the same How that in Bethlehem was born |The Son of God by name
[V4] "Fear not, then," said the angel, |"Let nothing you afright, This day is born a Savior |Of a pure virgin bright To free all those who trust in Him |From Satan's power and might."
[V5] Now to the Lord sing praises |All you within this place And with true love and brotherhood |Each other now embrace This holy tide of Christmas |All others doth deface.
